changes.description: BiomarkerScore has extra='forbid' — display fields cannot pass through the orchestrator pipeline. Cursor must populate display fields from upload_panel_observations at the DTO builder call site, not from BiomarkerScore.
changes.citation: results.py:20–23: model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True, extra='forbid'). Fields declared: biomarker_name, value, unit, score, percentile, status, range_source, reference_range, reference_profile, lab_band_label, interpretation, biomarker_educational_explainer, contribution_context. No display_value, display_unit, display_reference_range, display_is_uploaded_unit.
changes.required_action: Do NOT add display fields to BiomarkerScore. Populate them in analysis_route_biomarker_row() from upload_panel_observations dict. BiomarkerScore is a Layer B analytical object; display fields are Layer C only.

changes.description: analysis_route_biomarker_row() signature must be extended to accept upload_panel_observations. The call site in analysis.py:207 must pass this dict. No other call sites confirmed — Cursor must verify before implementing.
changes.citation: builders.py:116: def analysis_route_biomarker_row(b: BiomarkerScore) -> Dict[str, Any]. analysis.py:207: [analysis_route_biomarker_row(b) for b in dto.biomarkers]. upload_panel_observations is in local scope at analysis.py:148–152, available at line 207.
changes.required_action: Change signature to accept optional upload_observations: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None. Pass upload_panel_observations from analysis.py:207. Populate display_value, display_unit, display_reference_range, display_is_uploaded_unit from upload_observations[b.biomarker_name] where uploaded unit differs from b.unit. If key absent or unit matches analytical: display fields equal analytical fields. If uploaded reference_range absent: do not invent one.

changes.description: display_unit_policy.yaml does not cover Phase B biomarkers. Phase 4 SSOT-wide guard requires these entries to be present for coverage inventory to work.
changes.citation: display_unit_policy.yaml read in full. Phase B biomarkers absent: calcium, corrected_calcium, magnesium, free_t4, hemoglobin, urate. Registry confirms conversion authority at registry.py:75–81 (_CALCIUM_BIOMARKERS, _MAGNESIUM_BIOMARKERS, _FREE_T4_BIOMARKERS, _HEMOGLOBIN_BIOMARKERS, _URATE_BIOMARKERS). Allowed per prompt §Potentially allowed files.
changes.required_action: Add entries for calcium, corrected_calcium, magnesium, free_t4, hemoglobin, urate with layer_b_unit and uploaded_panel_fidelity sections. Authority is registry.py biomarker group membership and ssot/units.yaml conversion definitions. Presentation metadata only — no scoring or clinical fields.

changes.description: uploadPanelFidelity.ts filter correctly suppresses same-unit rows for UK/SI pass-through panels. This behaviour must be preserved. Main dial display fidelity fix makes this filter safe.
changes.citation: uploadPanelFidelity.ts:127–130: if (uploadUnit === canonicalUnit) continue. LC-S8F UAT section 8 D2 confirms uploaded panel not visible on b24ce358 pass-through fixture. Expected behaviour — same-unit rows need no fidelity row.
changes.required_action: Do not modify uploadPanelFidelity.ts filter logic. Main dial display fidelity is the primary fix for this sprint.

changes.description: upload_panel_observations reference range is available pre-normalisation with original uploaded units. Deterministic source for display_reference_range confirmed.
changes.citation: analysis.py:148–152: upload_panel_observations captured before apply_unit_normalisation() (line 159) and before hba1c arbitration (line 155). Structure includes value, unit, reference_range in original uploaded units. LC-S8F UAT §6 confirms calcium 9.4 mg/dL preserved for 7cc8b2d5 panel.
changes.required_action: Use upload_panel_observations[biomarker_name] as display field source at DTO builder stage. Deterministic — no STOP condition.

changes.description: test_lc_s8g_uploaded_unit_display_fidelity.py does not yet exist. Must be created as the primary regression guard.
changes.citation: Glob: no matching file found. Required by prompt Phase 5.
changes.required_action: Create file. Must cover: US upload produces display fields with uploaded unit and uploaded reference_range; UK upload produces display fields matching analytical; no display_reference_range invented when source absent; display_is_uploaded_unit flag correct.

changes.description: Sentinel pack lc_s8d_unit_governance_v1.json has no uploaded_unit_display_fidelity defect class. Phase 4 requires adding one.
changes.citation: Read in full. Existing 11 defect classes confirmed. No display-fidelity class present. Allowed per prompt §sentinel/packs/**/*.
changes.required_action: Add uploaded_unit_display_fidelity defect class to this pack or create lc_s8g_display_fidelity_v1.json. Class must reference test_lc_s8g_uploaded_unit_display_fidelity.py as test_file and status GUARDED after implementation.

changes.description: UAT fixture labels are swapped. LC-S8G prompt correctly identifies the mapping. Cursor must use 7cc8b2d5 as US conversion panel and b24ce358 as UK pass-through panel.
changes.citation: UAT §2 confirmed: 7cc8b2d5-c8f0-4138-ba18-8540eece06a1 = US upload -> UK/SI analytical. b24ce358-02e3-4058-a667-34328a4168a2 = UK/SI pass-through. LC-S8G prompt §Phase B UAT cases is correct.
changes.required_action: No action needed. Cursor must follow LC-S8G prompt §Phase B UAT cases mapping.

stop_conditions_checked.verdict: No STOP conditions triggered. Sprint may proceed.

implementation_order_note: Phase 1 (inventory doc) first. Phase 2 (backend DTO) requires H1+H2 resolved — extend analysis_route_biomarker_row() signature before any frontend changes. Phase 3 (frontend) depends on Phase 2 complete and TypeScript types updated. Phase 4 (SSOT guard) requires display_unit_policy.yaml update (H3). Phase 5 (tests) must cover all Phase 2 and Phase 3 surface changes.
